title: Moon Shaders
description: A lightweight Minecraft shader focused on delivering beautiful visuals
body:
### ABOUT

This shader enhances Minecraft with clean visuals and optimized effects to create a smooth and enjoyable experience. It features realistic water reflections, soft lighting, atmospheric skies, and subtle visual improvements that make the world feel more alive without heavily impacting FPS. Designed for players who want a balance between performance and visual quality.

### Key Features
- Realistic Water Reflections
- Smooth Dynamic Lighting
- Soft Bloom Effects
- Atmospheric Clouds & Sky
- Lightweight & FPS Friendly
